title: ask Write(*) alone -> Write is pre-approval-gated (ask), not auto-allowed

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P6-ask-rules/a-ask-alone/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: Write tool requires permission. Please approve the permission prompt.

hypothesis: A bare ask rule on Write(*) puts the call into the ask state (group baseline). headless -> auto-deny (DENIED), SDK -> canUseTool fires (ASK), interactive -> approval prompt. SDK confirms engine=ask vs deny.
